The Sun conjunct Mercury contacts Saturn in his movement at the frrst
instance and Ketu in the next house. So she will be employed in a Govt
concern. Her father also will win great fame in the year of her birth and in her

74 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
4th and 5th years when Jupiter transits Taurus. In her 7th and 8th years the
father will come to own a house and become very rich.
The native will have many obstacles in her educational career; but she
will continue her studies. She will come across some friends in her 23rd year.
The results ofthe combination ofRahu-Mars and Venus-Jupiter in the next
has been detailed in several horoscopes alrttady dealt with. It is always better
to stop after discussing a good indication by the combination and have the
sinister aspects since a good astrologer should never dwell on those points.
CHART 108
In this chart Mercury is in his
own house Gemini with the Moon in Sun Sat.
Ven.
the 7th to him.
